validation.passwordBetween8and16: Password must be between 8 and 16 characters

fields.usernameBetween: Username must be between 8 and 32 characters
fields.usernameStartsWithLetter: Username must start with a letter
fields.usernameAlphanumeric: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

fields.fullNameMinLength: Full name must be at least 2 characters
fields.fullNameLettersOnly: Full name can only contain letters and spaces

fields.avatarFileSizeExceeded: File size must be less than 5MB
fields.avatarFileTypeInvalid: File must be an image (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP)
fields.taxCodeInvalid: Tax code must be 10 or 13 digits
fields.commissionRateInvalid: Commission rate must be between 0 and 100
fields.yearsOfExperienceInvalid: Years of experience cannot be negative

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your login credentials to access your account
login.joinNetwork: Join JobSite's professional referral network and connect great talent with top companies.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No worries. Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.instruction: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you an OTP code.

resetPassword.title: Secure Your Account.
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the OTP sent to your email and create a new strong password to keep your account safe.
resetPassword.instruction: Enter the OTP code sent to
resetPassword.instruction2: Then create a new, strong password for your account.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: Update your password to keep your account secure
changePassword.instruction: Enter your current password and choose a new one
changePassword.requirement2: Must include at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter
changePassword.requirement3: Include at least one number, and only letters, numbers, underscores are allowed

hero.title: Find Your Next
